ORDER GRANTING PREFERENCE AND SETTING CASE FOR TRIAL

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-14-2005 IN 206, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENTIAL SETTING PURSUANT TO CCP 36 (A) WAS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF DEMANDED TRIAL BY JURY. THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 7/18/05 @ 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT. DISCOVERY REMAINS OPEN UNTIL 15 DAYS PRIOR TO TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED. HON. ROBERT L. DONDERO; CLERKS: V. MU/D. LOK; REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, #8600 (206)
